headline: Cinco de Mayo and Taco Tuesday Fall on the Same Day as Old El Paso Celebrates Rare "Taco Totality" with Exclusive Merch and Tacos for Fans Nationwide
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, April 21, 2026--For the first time since 2020, Cinco de Mayo and Taco Tuesday fall on the same day, creating what Old El Paso is calling "Taco Totality," a rare taco eclipse where two taco-filled occasions align – and won’t again until 2037.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on General Mills, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: Stifel  analyst Matthew Smith   maintains General Mills (NYSE:GIS) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $44 to $40.
